ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "spotrac_id" TEXT /* Link to player's Spotrac profile */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the contract */,
  "signed_using" TEXT /* Method used to sign the contract */,
  "trade_kicker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract has a trade kicker */,
  "can_block" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player has a blocking clause */,
  "how_acquired" TEXT /* Indicates how the player was acquired */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date the player was acquired */,
  "traded_from" TEXT /* Team from which the player was traded, if applicable */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "player_option" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player has an option to extend the contract */,
  "team_option" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team has an option to extend the contract */,
  "luxury_tax" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract is subject to the luxury tax */,
  "performance_bonuses" TEXT /* Performance-based bonuses (e.g., all-star appearances, MVP awards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the transaction */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Value of the trade, if applicable */,
  "trade_picks" TEXT /* Draft picks involved in the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_cap" (
  "cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary cap record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the salary cap */,
  "cap_limit" REAL /* Total salary cap limit for the year */,
  "used_cap" REAL /* Total salary currently used by the team */,
  "luxury_tax_threshold" REAL /* Luxury tax threshold for the year */,
  "remaining_cap_space" REAL /* Remaining cap space available for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_cap_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_injury_history" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player returned from injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "rehabilitation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player's rehabilitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_injury_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Team Manager, Scout) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user account security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the contract */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., salary increase, clause addition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_history_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)
